notes_for_human_reviewer: Ceiling submission. Each piece leads with substance and the most important fact is in the first line. No hedges anywhere — uncertainty is named precisely (vendor 'cited internal capacity, no root-cause analysis offered') rather than diffused. No reflexive apologies. Three sharply distinct registers: Slack is short, contraction-rich, three-option ask; PM email is structured with what-I've-done / what-I-need-from-you and an embedded draft for review; sponsor note is dignified, formal, complete in itself with three concrete actions and a clear next-step. Subject lines are content-rich. Length is proportional throughout. This is what hire-ready written voice looks like.
